data.revised_prompt:
Create one clean HD 2D game sprite animation sheet on a solid flat #FF00FF magenta chroma-key background only. Exact layout: 2 rows by 2 columns, exactly 4 equal invisible cells, read left-to-right across rows; no visible grid lines, no borders, no text.

Subject: Huo Ying fire lotus pet for Samsara Ascension — a small floating cute fire-lotus spirit, orange-golden petals, tiny ember-core face, soft flame-leaf shapes, friendly magical companion. Style: clean HD hand-painted 2D fantasy RPG sprite, readable at 32 to 64 pixel scale, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art.

Framing: full body visible in each frame, three-quarter RPG view from slightly above, centered in each cell, same body height and same pixel scale in every frame, subject fills about 50 to 58 percent of each cell with generous magenta margin. Stable anchor line in the same place when grounded; the sprite remains fully inside each cell with nothing crossing cell edges.

Animation: idle with real body pose changes only. Frame 1 top-left: neutral ready posture, body settled. Frame 2 top-right: visible breathing or energy inhale, shoulders or core lifts, small attached aura brightens. Frame 3 bottom-left: weight shifts to the opposite side, petals/arms/leaf-forms sway clearly. Frame 4 bottom-right: settle back toward the first pose, aura dims, loop returns naturally. Keep identity, silhouette family, palette, ember-face, petal/leaf shapes, and material language consistent across all frames; only pose and small attached aura may change.

Containment: the entire subject and any petal, hair, sleeve, talisman, or tiny attached aura must fit fully inside each cell; no detached projectile, no impact burst, no large slash arc, no long trail, no dust cloud.

Background: 100% solid #FF00FF magenta only, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no cast shadow. Forbidden: photorealism, 3D render, pixel art, alternate forms, extra characters, cropped body parts, inconsistent scale, labels, watermark, UI.
